## Type of Change

<!-- Check the one that applies. -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or component
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `style` — Code style change (no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `chore` — Build, tooling, or dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Component is registered in all entry files (`index.ts`, `index.scss`, `stellux-ui`)
- [ ] Documentation page is added with live demos
- [ ] VitePress sidebar is updated in `config.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm dev` runs without errors
- [ ] `pnpm docs:build` passes
- [ ] Dark mode styles are handled
- [ ] Accessibility (ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation) is considered
